name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 19 Apr 2023

This is reflected in the Payment Details in Neto."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"PayPal Checkout and PayPal Advanced Credit and Debit Cards payments initiated from a customer’s My Account page pass the Neto Order ID to "},{"text":"only ","bold":true},{"text":"the PayPal transaction’s "},{"text":"Description","bold":true},{"text":" field. This is reflected in the Payment Details in Neto."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"bold":true,"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"Fixes"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with Shipping Rate Tables where the Transit Cover percentage value was not saved."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with Allied Express shipping consignments where the tracking details on the order page were not working."}]}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
